title: HX2 antipersonnel mine

The '''HX2 antipersonnel mine''' was a [[Proximity mine/Legends|proximity mine]] produced by [[Conner Ship Systems]] that was considered outdated, but cheap, by the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="BF I guide" /> These antipersonnel explosives were commonly used during the Clone Wars by [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commandos]] and [[assault battle droid]]s.<ref name="BF I" /> and occasionally during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The HX2 mine was a octagonal disc-shaped explosive, easily concealed around the battlefield for anti-personnel use. The mine contained an explosive charge of detonite, which was set off when tripped by a proximity sensor.<ref name="Databank">{{DB|technology|hx2mine|HX2 antipersonnel mine}}</ref> The HX2 mine was favored both by the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] legions of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the ARC Troopers of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="BF I" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] it was used by [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] of both sides of the war.

==Behind the scenes==
HX2 mines appear in several [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s, as well as the comic ''[[Honor Bound]]''.
